loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: This meter (AUX-HSD-PLC) does not measure voltage, current, harmonics, flicker, or crest factor; it logs temperature, flow, and status flags. All harmonic and power quality slots are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing per-phase THD trends (V-THD and I-THD) — per-order harmonic magnitudes (H5/H7) and scalar stats are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: one or more leaves could not be bound for this card on this asset — those leaves render an honest blank (per-leaf reasons attached), every other leaf fills

loop2: 'individual-feeder-meter-shell/power-quality' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Power Quality (This meter (AUX-HSD-PLC) does not measure voltage, current, harmonics, flicker, or crest factor; it logs temperature, flow, and status flags. All harmonic and power quality slots are honest-blanked.).
